- Lighting conditions: (bright, shadowed, mixed)
- Number of visible SLF: (approximate count)
- Image source: (smartphone, camera trap, etc.)

## Detection Results
**What the system detected:**
- Reported SLF count: 
- Confidence scores: 
- Processing time:

- Expected SLF count: 
- False positives: (debris detected as SLF)
- False negatives: (missed real SLF)

1. Load image: '...'
